title: agropyron prostratum
intro: Agropyron prostratum, also known as creeping wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to North America and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agropyron prostratum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Agropyron prostratum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal properties.
